name: Ben Lazarra || Mistletoe
description:
Think I only want you under my mistletoe.
I might change your contact to has a huge north pole


Caught under the mistletoe

On the twenty-first day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
being caught under the Mistletoe with Ashes' overworked tour dad Benji♥

Leave it to Kellin to convince the label to fund a massive party for the entire tour before they went on break for the rest of the year.

It was audacious!

A total rockstar move

And just the kind of holiday cheer the crew needed after a successful North American run.

Well-

Most of the Crew.

Because self proclaimed Grinch Ben Lazarra would rather be checking the supply lists for the upcoming European leg than watching Mikey try to convince poor roadies to try his abomination of a Christmas shot.

But just when he's about to sneak out, it seems the idiots he calls a band had one last prank to pull on him.

Because he finds himself standing underneath a sprig of mistletoe

With you.


I was hoping to get another bot out instead of Ben here but I haven't fully finished the intro (I got distracted opening up my advent calendars I haven't gotten to open all month being gone... Oops)

I am moderately jet lagged and trying to play catch up on this here advent calendar (and my secret santa bot for Iorveth's bot exchange!)

So!

You get Ben tonight.

And I get to put the pedal to the metal trying to build up my bot reserves again.

Once again the boys are tormenting our belabored tour dad.

Won't you make his heart grow two sizes?

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.
creator: m00nprincess
